name: MigrateIQ
summary: AI-powered migration accelerator using semantic matching, LLM-assisted disambiguation, analyst review, and SQL export.

name: EDI Transformation Analytics Platform
summary: Boomi + SQL workflow for exception review, correction, approval, and reprocessing of EDI transactions.

name: Documentation Agents
summary: Converted intake materials into structured briefs and reusable project artifacts to speed project startup and knowledge transfer.

name: RSM DEQS
summary: Data comparison and validation tool handling CSV, JSON, and Excel schemas to improve migration readiness and issue detection.

name: Accounts Payable Automation
summary: Automated accounts-payable workflows to reduce backlog, improve timeliness, and lower manual effort.

name: Hospital Pricing Transparency & Billing Automation
summary: Supported healthcare process automation and medical billing workflows, including charge master, claims, and service-data alignment.

name: FP&A Modernization
summary: Modernized finance and performance reporting using Snowflake and Power BI for operational visibility and decision support.

name: State Insurance Spatial Analytics
summary: Designed spatial analytics for a state insurance department spanning provider specialties, facility types, and hundreds of locations.

name: Financial Services Governance Playbooks
summary: Supported governance, controls, standards, and transformation playbooks for major financial-services clients.

name: SOX Readiness and Data Architecture Support
summary: Assisted clients with SOX readiness while improving data architecture and control design.

name: AI-Assisted RFP Workflow System
summary: Used modular workflow orchestration for requirement extraction, capability matching, and template-aware response generation.

name: Documentation Orchestration System
summary: A 12-agent documentation system covering intake, validation, orchestration, research, mapping, and technical design.

name: MCP-Enabled Development Workflows
summary: Integrated MCP-enabled tooling into development workflows with VS Code and Claude-based systems.

name: Local LLM Experimentation
summary: Experimented with local LLM workflows using Ollama and LM Studio in support of practical workflow development and evaluation.

name: Prompt Libraries and Agentic Workflow Patterns
summary: Developed prompt libraries, modular agent concepts, and context-management patterns for enterprise workflow use cases.
